mapper.insert: insert into menu_image ( menu_idx, image_url, is_primary, display_order) values( #{menuIdx}, #{imageUrl}, #{isPrimary}, #{displayOrder} )
mapper.select: SELECT mi.* FROM menu_image mi JOIN store_menu m ON mi.menu_idx = m.menu_idx WHERE m.store_idx = #{storeIdx} ORDER BY mi.menu_image_idx DESC
